howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From symptom to scan in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us your symptoms or the scan your doctor recommended. Our AI advisor matches you with the right scan and clinic.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse available slots at accredited clinics. Compare prices, read reviews, and book instantly — no referral needed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Fly to your appointment. Get scanned by expert radiologists. Receive your report in English within 24 hours.
